// note: vectors-runner.ts and vectors-run.ts are EXCLUDED from the typecheck: they import the BUILT dist/scp/index.mjs (the consumer artifact) which TS bundler-resolution cannot type without a colocated .d.mts. They are validated by ACTUALLY RUNNING them (npm run conformance:vectors / conformance:run) — a stronger check than a type pass. harness.ts (source-imported) IS typechecked here.
